meaning: n.繁荣,隆隆声v.发隆隆声,兴隆,大事宣传
examples: He made a small fortune in the property boom.
Living standards improved rapidly during the post-war boom.
The technology boom sent share prices into the stratosphere.
That tradition continues with UE BOOM and interactive programs such as The Social Music Experiment.
Newcomers include Houston, riding high on oil profits, and Phoenix, lifted by a housing boom.
